prestazioni: Engine swap to a **D16Y8 (1.6L SOHC VTEC)** from the 1996-2000 Honda Civic EX, paired with a **Garrett GT2860RS turbocharger** (0.63 A/R turbine housing) and a **Toda Racing Stage 2 stroker kit** (81mm crank, 87mm pistons, 11.5:1 compression) for a target of 350whp on E85 fuel. Forced induction managed via a **Hondata K-Pro ECU** with custom maps for the D16Y8, including **ID1000 fuel injectors** and a **Walbro 450LPH in-tank fuel pump**.

Full **Spoon Sports** drivetrain reinforcement: **Spoon Sports 84mm billet crank pulley**, **Spoon Sports lightweight flywheel (4.5kg)**, and a **Helical LSD (Torsen Type-S)** for the S4C transmission. Clutch upgraded to a **Spec Stage 3+ twin-disc** with a **Spoon Sports reinforced pressure plate** to handle the increased torque.

Suspension overhaul with **Tein Flex Z coilovers (Honda-specific valving)** and **Spoon Sports front/rear sway bars (22mm front, 18mm rear)**. Braking system upgraded to **Endless CC-R6 6-pot calipers** with **DBA 5000 Series rotors (330mm front, 290mm rear)** and **Project Mu 999.9 compound brake pads**. Chassis stiffening via **Spoon Sports 4-point strut bar** and **Cusco rear lower tie bar**.
estetica: **Liberty Walk LB Works** widebody conversion kit (Shuttle-specific, not Civic-based) with **custom carbon fiber fenders (2.5-inch flares)**, **Liberty Walk duckbill rear wing**, and **custom front splitter** with **Spoon Sports canards**. Full **3M Matte Pearl White (120A)** wrap with **Rally Armor UR mud flaps** in black.

Interior stripped and rebuilt with **Recaro Pole Position seats (JDM-spec, cloth/Alcantara)**, **Spoon Sports MOMO steering wheel (350mm, suede)**, and **Defi BF gauges (oil pressure, boost, wideband AFR)** mounted in a **Spoon Sports A-pillar pod**. Custom **Rally Design roll cage (8-point, TIG-welded)** with **Sabelt 6-point harnesses**.

Lighting upgraded to **Morimoto XB LED headlights (H4 retrofit)** with **Osram Night Breaker Laser bulbs (H7 high-beams)**, **Depo Racing JDM-spec taillights (clear lens, red LED)**, and **Philips Ultinon LED fog lights**. Wheels: **Work Emotion CR Kiwami (17x9 +35 front, 17x10 +30 rear)** with **Yokohama Advan A052 tires (225/40/17 front, 255/35/17 rear)** and **Project Kics R40 lug nuts**.
